welcome.title: Welcome to venOS!
welcome.intro: You're helping us build the simplest way for event vendors to know if they actually made money.
welcome.focusPrefix: This beta version is focused on one thing:
welcome.focusHighlight: Getting you from event → to true profit in minutes.

step1.title: Add a Real Event
step1.description: Use a past event from the last 30 days.

step2.title: Connect & Sync Sales
step2.description: If you use Square, connect it in Settings. venOS will pull your real sales and tax data automatically.

step3.title: Add Your Costs
step3.description: Enter labor, supplies, event fees, and food tax. Then open your Profit Summary.

discover.heading: What You'll Discover
discover.item1: ✅ Your true net profit (after tax + fees)
discover.item3: ✅ Whether the event was worth it

welcome.disclaimer: This is a beta version. Please report bugs. Financial calculations are based on the data entered or synced. If something looks incorrect, tell us.
welcome.ctaPrimary: 🚀 Let's Go — Create My First Event

upgrade.title: Unlock the complete picture.
upgrade.subtitle: See every event's true profit, track trends over time, and make smarter decisions — faster.

contexts.report: Post-Event Reports are a Pro feature.
contexts.finalize: Starter includes 1 finalized event. Upgrade to track more.
contexts.history: Viewing finalized event history requires Pro.
contexts.pdf: PDF export is a Pro feature.
contexts.multiday: Starter supports up to 2-day events. Upgrade to Pro for longer festivals.

reports.title: Post-Event Reports
reports.description: Full profit & loss breakdown, shareable and printable

unlimited.title: Unlimited finalized events
unlimited.description: Track every market, festival, and pop-up you run

pdf.title: PDF export
pdf.description: Download branded reports for your records or accountant

history.title: Full event history
history.description: Compare events over time to find your most profitable markets

sync.title: Square POS sync
sync.description: Pull real sales data — fees, refunds, and discounts included

templates.title: Custom form templates
templates.description: Design event forms that match exactly how you work

upgrade.starterNote: You're on <1>venOS Starter</1> — includes 1 finalized event and basic profit summary.
upgrade.secureNote: Secure checkout powered by Stripe · cancel anytime

posMapping.title: Match Your POS Menu to Your Recipe Cards
posMapping.description: Map each POS item to an inventory item once — venOS calculates costs automatically every sync. Use <2>"Not in my menu"</2> for tips, misc charges, etc.
posMapping.suggestedLegend: ✨ <1>{{count}} item(s)</1> were auto-matched by name — marked <3>suggested</3>. Review before saving.
posMapping.unmappedWarning: ⚠️ <1>{{count}} item(s)</1> have no recipe card — COGS will show as $0 for those.
posMapping.empty: No POS catalog items found. Make sure your POS is connected and has items.

toast.saved: ✅ Mappings saved! Cost calculations are now accurate.
